dataFlows.transformKql:
source
| extend TimeGenerated = iff(
    isnull(todatetime(eventTime)) or todatetime(eventTime) < ago(2d),
    now(),
    todatetime(eventTime)
  )
| extend mimecastEventType = tostring(mimecastEventType)
| extend mimecastEventId   = tostring(mimecastEventId)
| extend senderAddress    = tostring(iff(isnotempty(mimecast_body.senderAddress),     mimecast_body.senderAddress,
                             iff(isnotempty(mimecast_body.senderEnvelope),            mimecast_body.senderEnvelope,
                             iff(isnotempty(mimecast_body.fromUserEmailAddress),       mimecast_body.fromUserEmailAddress, ''))))
| extend recipientAddress = tostring(iff(isnotempty(mimecast_body.recipientAddress),  mimecast_body.recipientAddress,
                             iff(isnotempty(mimecast_body.userEmailAddress),           mimecast_body.userEmailAddress, '')))
| extend subject          = tostring(mimecast_body.subject)
| extend action           = tostring(iff(isnotempty(mimecast_body.action),            mimecast_body.action,
                             iff(isnotempty(mimecast_body.actionTriggered),            mimecast_body.actionTriggered, '')))
| extend messageId        = tostring(mimecast_body.messageId)
| extend route            = tostring(mimecast_body.route)
| extend url              = tostring(mimecast_body.url)
| extend fileHash         = tostring(iff(isnotempty(mimecast_body.fileHash),          mimecast_body.fileHash,
                             iff(isnotempty(mimecast_body.sha256),                    mimecast_body.sha256, '')))
| extend fileName         = tostring(mimecast_body.fileName)
| extend scanResult       = tostring(iff(isnotempty(mimecast_body.scanResult),        mimecast_body.scanResult,
                             iff(isnotempty(mimecast_body.result),                    mimecast_body.result, '')))
| extend senderIp         = tostring(iff(isnotempty(mimecast_body.senderIp),          mimecast_body.senderIp,
                             iff(isnotempty(mimecast_body.senderIpAddress),           mimecast_body.senderIpAddress,
                             iff(isnotempty(mimecast_body.sendingIp),                 mimecast_body.sendingIp, ''))))
| extend auditType        = tostring(mimecast_body.auditType)
| extend accountId        = tostring(mimecast_body.accountId)
| extend aggregateId      = tostring(mimecast_body.aggregateId)
| extend mimecast_body    = tostring(mimecast_body)
| project TimeGenerated, eventTime, mimecastEventType, mimecastEventId, mimecast_body,
          senderAddress, recipientAddress, subject, action, messageId, route,
          url, fileHash, fileName, scanResult, senderIp, auditType, accountId, aggregateId
